description:
The pcsc-lite-ccid package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install pcsc-lite-ccid
rationale:
The pcsc-lite-ccid package must be installed if it is to be available for
multifactor authentication using smartcards.
ocil_clause: the pcsc-lite-ccid package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the pcsc-lite-ccid package is installed: 
$ rpm -q pcsc-lite-ccid
fixtext:
To install the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 package pcsc-lite-ccid run the following command:


    $ sudo dnf install pcsc-lite-ccid
srg_requirement: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 must have the pcsc-lite-ccid package installed.

stig.fixtext:
To install the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 package pcsc-lite-ccid run the following command:


    $ sudo dnf install pcsc-lite-ccid
stig.srg_requirement: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 must have the pcsc-lite-ccid package installed.
stig.checktext:
Verify that Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 has the opensc package installed with the following command:

$ dnf list --installed pcsc-lite-ccid

Example output:

pcsc-lite-ccid.x86_64                            1.6.0-2.el10

If the "pcsc-lite-ccid" package is not installed, this is a finding.
stig.vuldiscussion: The pcsc-lite-ccid package must be installed if it is to be available for multifactor authentication using smart cards.

title: Install the pcsc-lite-ccid package
